creator: joel@tahoestores.com
text:
You proceed from false assumptions.

I use portsnap to update and your grep example is faulty.

If I check th3e distfile I get:

root@tahoestores:/usr/ports/graphics/gpu-firmware-intel-kmod # more distinfo
TIMESTAMP = 1704270482
SHA256 (freebsd-drm-kmod-firmware-20230625-20230625_4_GH0.tar.gz) = 509eb439ba85e051016127c59d32cf15f873db6558c6da8fe0af76536259152d
SIZE (freebsd-drm-kmod-firmware-20230625-20230625_4_GH0.tar.gz) = 30535277

Which indicates that I have the latest version.

I don't see an option for the @* configuration:

root@tahoestores:/usr/ports/graphics/gpu-firmware-intel-kmod # make config
===> No options to configure

I do not use poudriere as it is overkill for only one server.

Please reopen or forward this to someone a bit more versed in the FreeBsd port system.

thanks.
